close_reason: Follow-on refinements committed. Reconnect blocked on recovery refactor (bedrock-znki).
description:
On reconnect/restart, the coordinator hangs waiting for TSL restoration from Raft that never comes. Root cause: send_recovery_consensus_for_committed_transactions only processes waiting_list, which is empty on cold boot.

Key insight: TSL is OUTPUT of recovery, not input. PIDs are ephemeral. No point restoring TSL from Raft.

Approach:
- Remove TSL and config from Raft entirely
- Object storage is single source of truth for cluster state
- Raft only handles: epoch consensus, node resource registration
title: Simplify Coordinator Cold Boot - Object Storage as Source of Truth
